acceptanceSignals: Vendor operations board shows per-plant counts, special needs, and delivery status in near real-time.
System exports daily summary, plant partition sheet, labels, and basket list.
Export artifacts are generated from immutable batch snapshots.

attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: Vendor Fulfillment Board and Exports in 0 attempts

lastCommit.message: feat: implement Vendor Fulfillment Board and Exports (attempt 1)

reinforcementResults.name: HTTP Contract Sync Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: The current feature satisfies the active HTTP contract policy: newly introduced vendor fulfillment HTTP operations are reflected in the formal OpenAPI contract (`contract/openapi/openapi.yaml` and `contract/openapi/openapi.json`) and synchronized generated artifacts (`contract/generated/ts-client/**`) within the same change set, with contract tests in place for route-to-spec parity and error-response schema references.

reinforcementResults.name: No Legacy Path Rule
reinforcementResults.summary: The current Vendor Fulfillment Board and Exports implementation satisfies the active policy for this feature: immutable deterministic batch snapshots are implemented, operational board data and auditable status transitions are present, special-request output is constrained to controlled enum structure, and no legacy/fallback compatibility branches or superseded fulfillment DTO/route/handler paths were found in this feature slice.

excludedApproaches: Manual spreadsheet consolidation as the primary fulfillment workflow.
Generating packing artifacts from mutable live query state.
Unrestricted free-text modifier printing in labels by default.
executionConstraints: Generate fulfillment outputs from deterministic snapshot batches.
Expose real-time operational board with auditable status transitions.
Render special-request data only through controlled, low-risk structure.
name: Vendor Fulfillment Board and Exports
rationale: Fulfillment quality directly affects leakage, mispack, and wrong-delivery incidents.
summary: Support vendor prep and delivery execution with structured operational outputs.
